text.title: Supabase RLS Audit Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: Any table with rls_enabled=false AND no documented exemption (r1).
fixture_path empty AND audit claims tests ran (r5).

example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
rls_enabled=false on a public table (r1); tenant_isolation_test_pass=false (r3); owner=team; missing artefact_id, version, last_reviewed, fixture_path.
